notes: log p(x1,x2) = -0.5*[(a-x1)^2 + b*(x2-x1^2)^2]. Mode at (a, a^2)=(1,1). The posterior has a narrow curved valley along x2=x1^2. Marginal for x1 is approximately N(1, 1). Marginal for x2 is non-Gaussian due to curvature. Verify that the sampled mean is near (1, ~1.5) and that the x1-x2 scatter plot shows the characteristic banana shape.
